---
title: "Regereron"
---

# Financial Statements

| Year | Q1 | Q2 | Q3 | Q4 |
|---------------|---------------|---------------|---------------|---------------|
| 2021 | [2021 Q1](https://investor.regeneron.com/news-releases/news-release-details/regeneron-reports-first-quarter-2021-financial-and-operating) | [2021 Q2](https://investor.regeneron.com/news-releases/news-release-details/regeneron-reports-second-quarter-2021-financial-and-operating) | [2021 Q3](https://investor.regeneron.com/news-releases/news-release-details/regeneron-reports-third-quarter-2021-financial-and-operating) | [2021 Q4](https://newsroom.regeneron.com/news-releases/news-release-details/regeneron-reports-fourth-quarter-and-full-year-2021-financial) |
| 2022 | [2022 Q1](https://investor.regeneron.com/news-releases/news-release-details/regeneron-reports-first-quarter-2022-financial-and-operating) | [2022 Q2](https://investor.regeneron.com/news-releases/news-release-details/regeneron-reports-second-quarter-2022-financial-and-operating) | [2022 Q3](https://investor.regeneron.com/news-releases/news-release-details/regeneron-reports-third-quarter-2022-financial-and-operating) | [2022 Q4](https://newsroom.regeneron.com/news-releases/news-release-details/regeneron-reports-fourth-quarter-and-full-year-2022-financial) |
| 2023 | [2023 Q1](https://investor.regeneron.com/news-releases/news-release-details/regeneron-reports-first-quarter-2023-financial-and-operating) | [2023 Q2](https://investor.regeneron.com/news-releases/news-release-details/regeneron-reports-second-quarter-2023-financial-and-operating) | [2023 Q3](https://investor.regeneron.com/news-releases/news-release-details/regeneron-reports-third-quarter-2023-financial-and-operating) | [2023 Q4](https://newsroom.regeneron.com/news-releases/news-release-details/regeneron-reports-fourth-quarter-and-full-year-2023-financial) |
| 2024 | [2024 Q1](https://investor.regeneron.com/news-releases/news-release-details/regeneron-reports-first-quarter-2024-financial-and-operating) | [2024 Q2](https://investor.regeneron.com/news-releases/news-release-details/regeneron-reports-second-quarter-2024-financial-and-operating) | [2024 Q3](https://investor.regeneron.com/news-releases/news-release-details/regeneron-reports-third-quarter-2024-financial-and-operating) |  |
